title: uva-ursi nummularia
intro: Uva-ursi nummularia, also known as bearberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to northern Europe, Asia, and North America, characterized by its small, green leaves and red berries. The plant contains arbutin, a compound with medicinal properties that help to reduce inflammation and combat infections. The health benefits of uva-ursi include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, alleviate diarrhea, and soothe irritated skin, thanks to its antimicrobial and astringent properties. Uva-ursi is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, and can also be found in capsule or tablet form, allowing users to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its various health benefits.
